theme.name: Xanadu Voyage
theme.notes: E aeolian (natural minor). Prog rock / Xanadu-influenced cinematic instrumental. Motif: ascending perfect 4th + minor 3rd, then a falling 3rd + step back up — an 'arrival then question' shape. Transform pool is wide to allow motif to mutate across development sections. Instruments: Mellotron V for the classic prog string/flute texture, ARP 2600 or Mini V for lead. Valhalla Shimmer on harmony, Valhalla Supermassive on counterpoint tail. Logic tempo 116 BPM.
